'''Brint-wo''' was a large ringed [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was orbitted by the [[Brint-wo Colony]].

==History==
The system was presumably friendly to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], as Rebel pilot [[Olin Garn]] was temporarily stationed on the planet in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. During this time, Garn rendezvoused with the [[Azzameen family]]. The family was delivering [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] to the nearby Rebel [[Hospital (XQ2 Platform)|Hospital]], which treated wounded Rebel personnel after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. The system then served as a getaway point for [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] after they fled an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle of Hospital|ambush]] on the hospital. While Emon and Ace both survived, their father [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas]] and their older brother [[Galin Azzameen/Legends|Galin]] did not escape.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
